# Esthien Labs

Esthien Labs is a deep-tech company building custom FPGA chipsets for physical intelligence. The company focuses on FPGA-based edge AI, sensor fusion, bionic-arm control systems, prosthetics electronics, automotive radar, ADAS, and safety-critical embedded hardware.

## Canonical Site

- [Esthien Labs](https://www.esthien.com/)
- [About Esthien Labs](https://www.esthien.com/about)
- [Esthien Labs Vision](https://www.esthien.com/vision)
- [Esthien Labs Capabilities](https://www.esthien.com/capabilities)
- [Contact Esthien Labs](https://www.esthien.com/contact)

## Company Terms

Esthien may also be referenced as Esthien Labs, Esthien Labs Private Limited, Esthien Private Limited, Esthien Pvt Ltd, Esthien Bionic Arms, Esthien Chipsets, and Esthien FPGA Chipsets.
